__fixture__.name: small_rust_self_host_slice
__fixture__.scenario: A narrow slice of the Aureline repo itself (three seeded crates, no vendored code) used as the Rust workspace archetype fixture. The slice is defined by an include / exclude pattern list; the benchmark lab resolves it at run time against the live repository so the manifest does not carry a second copy of the source. Exercises the rust_workspace archetype, startup-with-Cargo-metadata, first-open on a real repo root, and VFS root enumeration under the pinned toolchain.

notes: This reference workspace exists so the benchmark lab can measure a known-archetype first-open without vendoring a second copy of the crate sources. Changes to the covered crates shift the measurement inputs; the benchmark report records the repository commit and slice resolution in its run metadata so comparisons across runs remain well-defined.
